content: So glad the packages are posted! We are looking at the Classic for my daughter next October. Going to fill out the inquiry form today.
Do the packages include the DJ or is that separate?
Sandra — DJ is included in Classic and Premiere, add-on for Essential. Send me a message through the contact page and I can walk you through it.
The holiday cookie sets look amazing. Just placed my order for the December baby shower.
This was my daughter Camila's event! Chris made everything perfect. The waltz was flawless and the cookies were a huge hit with the guests.
Great advice. The bit about catering policy is the one people always overlook.
Yolanda — exactly right. Finding out a venue is cash-bar only after you have already booked it is a bad day.
